steps.description: Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the VS Code welcome sign-in dialog to dismiss the prompt.
Press the "F1" key to open the command palette in the Visual Studio Code workspace interface.
Type text: 'Open settings (UI)' into the command palette search bar in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted command "Preferences: Open Settings (UI)" in the Visual Studio Code command palette.

parameters.text: enable launch agent for teams in copilot

steps.description: Type text: 'enable launch agent for teams in copilot'
@assertion 'Enable launch Agent for Teams in Microsoft 365 Copilot' is checked.
Click the "X" button in the context menu of the VS Code tab bar to close the active tab.
